title: Kendrick Machill'Tr
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Kendrick Machill'Tr''' was a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] with [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] assigned as the Administrative Aide to [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]].

Lieutenant Machill'Tr was resposnible for gathering all the appropriate intelligence reports related to the [[Corellian Crisis|Corellian Incident]] and the [[Human League]] before submitting them to General Cracken for review.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-XX -->''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' {{1stm}}
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
